name: au-return-assembly
description: Final orchestrator skill that assembles the complete Australian filing package for Australian-resident sole traders. Consumes outputs from all Australian content skills (australia-gst for BAS, au-individual-return for ITR, au-super-guarantee for voluntary contributions, au-medicare-levy for levy and surcharge, au-payg-instalments for instalment schedule) to produce a single unified reviewer package containing every worksheet, every form, every brief section, all cross-skill reconciliations, and
author: openaccountants
